{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_19","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport pandas as pd\nimport re\n\n# Load tables\nbatches=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')\nassign=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')\nins=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')\nproducts=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv')\nwo=pd.read_csv('/app/maintenance_work_orders.csv')\n\n# parse reports\nrecords=[]\npat=re.compile(r'\"'^(.*?):'\"\\\\s*(.*)\"'$'\"')\nfor _,row in wo.iterrows():\n    data={}\n    with open('/app/'+row['report_path']) as f:\n        for line in f:\n            m=pat.match(line.strip())\n            if m:\n                data[m.group(1)] = m.group(2)\n    records.append({\n        'day': int(row['day']),\n        'work_order_id': row['work_order_id'],\n        'machine_id': data['MACHINE'],\n        'technician_id': data['TECHNICIAN'],\n        'work_type': data['WORK TYPE'],\n        'reason': data['REPORTED REASON'],\n        'start_time': data['STARTED'],\n        'completed_time': data['COMPLETED'],\n    })\nmaint=pd.DataFrame(records)\n\ndef tm(s):\n    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))\n    return h*60+m\nmaint['completed_min']=maint['completed_time'].map(tm)\nmaint['start_min']=maint['start_time'].map(tm)\nmaint['event_ts']=maint['day']*1440+maint['completed_min']\nmaint=maint.sort_values(['machine_id','event_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)\nmaint['next_event_ts']=maint.groupby('machine_id')['event_ts'].shift(-1)\nmaint['next_work_order_id']=maint.groupby('machine_id')['work_order_id'].shift(-1)\n\n# batch start ts\nbatch=assign.merge(batches[['batch_id','job_id','product_id','machine_id','production_day']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')\nassert batch['batch_id'].notna().all()\nbatch['start_min']=batch['start_time'].map(tm)\nbatch['start_ts']=batch['day']*1440+batch['start_min']\n# inspection info\nbatch=batch.merge(ins[['batch_id','inspection_day','rejected_pct','rejected_quantity','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')\nbatch=batch.merge(products[['product_id','quality_rejection_threshold_pct']], on='product_id', how='left')\n\n# link to maintenance intervals using merge_asof per machine\nlinked=[]\nfor m, g in batch.sort_values(['machine_id','start_ts']).groupby('machine_id', sort=False):\n    mg=maint[maint['machine_id']==m].sort_values('event_ts')\n    if mg.empty:\n        gg=g.copy()\n        gg['work_order_id']=pd.NA\n        gg['technician_id']=pd.NA\n        gg['event_ts']=pd.NA\n        gg['next_event_ts']=pd.NA\n        linked.append(gg)\n        continue\n    merged=pd.merge_asof(g.sort_values('start_ts'), mg[['event_ts','work_order_id','technician_id','next_event_ts','work_type','reason']], left_on='start_ts', right_on='event_ts', direction='backward')\n    linked.append(merged)\nlinked=pd.concat(linked, ignore_index=True)\n# ensure before next event if exists (merge_asof by construction gives previous event; just filter if start_ts < next_event_ts or next_event_ts nan)\nlinked['linked_ok']=linked['event_ts'].notna() & (linked['next_event_ts'].isna() | (linked['start_ts'] < linked['next_event_ts']))\nlinked=linked[linked['linked_ok']].copy()\nprint('linked batches', len(linked), 'of', len(batch))\nprint('unlinked', len(batch)-len(linked))\n\n# interval summary\ninterval=linked.groupby(['machine_id','work_order_id','technician_id']).agg(\n    day=('day','first'),\n    work_type=('work_type','first'),\n    reason=('reason','first'),\n    n_batches=('batch_id','size'),\n    n_rej=('inspection_result', lambda s:(s=='REJECTED').sum()),\n    rej_rate=('inspection_result', lambda s:(s=='REJECTED').mean()),\n    products=('product_id', lambda s: len(set(s))),\n    defects=('defect_code', lambda s: len(set(s))),\n).reset_index()\nprint(interval.sort_values('n_rej', ascending=False).head(30).to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

comb(n,k)*(p**k)*((1-p)**(n-k))\n    rows.append((tail, row['technician_id'], row['product_id'], n, r, p, row['wos']))\nrows=sorted(rows)[:100]\nfor tail,t,pid,n,r,p,wos in rows[:80]:\n    print(t, t json\nproducts=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv').set_index('product_id')['quality_rejection_threshold_pct']\nwo=pd.read_csv('/app/maintenance_work_orders.csv')\npat=re.compile(r'\"'^(.*?):'\"\\\\s*(.*)\"'$'\"')\nrecs=[]\nfor _,row in wo.iterrows():\n    data={}\n    with open('/app/'+row['report_path']) as f:\n        for line in f:\n            m=pat.match(line.strip())\n            if m:\n                data[m.group(1)] = m.group(2)\n    recs.append({'day':int(row['day']),'work_order_id':row['work_order_id'],'machine_id':data['MACHINE'],'technician_id':data['TECHNICIAN'],'completed':data['COMPLETED']})\nmaint=pd.DataFrame(recs)\ndef tm(s):\n    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))\n    return h*60+m\nmaint['event_ts']=maint['day']*1440+maint['completed'].map(tm)\nmaint=maint.sort_values(['machine_id','event_ts']).reset_index(drop=True)\nmaint['next_event_ts']=maint.groupby('machine_id')['event_ts'].shift(-1)\nassign=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')\nbatches=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')\nins=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')\njoined=assign.merge(batches[['batch_id','job_id','product_id','machine_id','production_day']], on=['job_id','machine_id'])\njoined=joined.merge(ins[['batch_id','inspection_result','rejected_pct','defect_code']], on='batch_id')\njoined['start_ts']=joined['day']*1440+joined['start_time'].map(tm)\nparts=[]\nfor m,g in joined.sort_values(['machine_id','start_ts']).groupby('machine_id', sort=False):\n    mg=maint[maint.machine_id==m][['event_ts','work_order_id','technician_id','next_event_ts']].sort_values('event_ts')\n    merged=pd.merge_asof(g.sort_values('start_ts'), mg, left_on='start_ts', right_on='event_ts', direction='backward')\n    parts.append(merged)\nlinked=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\nlinked=linked[linked['event_ts'].notna() & (linked['next_event_ts'].isna() | (linked['start_ts']<linked['next_event_ts']))].copy()\nrej=linked[linked.inspection_result=='REJECTED'].copy()\nrej['thr']=rej['product_id'].map(products)\nrej['excess']=rej['rejected_pct']-rej['thr']\nfor thr in [0.01,0.015,0.02,0.025,0.03,0.04]:\n    sus=rej[rej['excess']>thr]\n    tech=sus.groupby('technician_id').agg(b=('batch_id','size'),w=('work_order_id','nunique')).query('b>=3 and w>=2')\n    mapping={}\n    for pid,g in sus[sus.technician_id.isin(tech.index)].groupby('product_id'):\n        mapping[pid]=sorted(g.technician_id.unique())\n    print('THR',thr,'techs',sorted(tech.index.tolist()))\n    print('products',len(mapping), mapping)\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

comb\nwo=pd.read_csv('/app/maintenance_work_orders.csv')\npat=re.compile(r'\"'^(.*?):'\"\\\\s*(.*)\"'$'\"')\nrecs=[]\nfor _,row in wo.iterrows():\n    data={}\n    with open('/app/'+row['report_path']) as f:\n        for line in f:\n            m=pat.match(line.strip())\n            if m:\n                data[m.group(1)] = m.group(2)\n    recs.append({'day':int(row['day']),'work_order_id':row['work_order_id'],'machine_id':data['MACHINE'],'technician_id':data['TECHNICIAN'],'completed':data['COMPLETED']})\nmaint=pd.DataFrame(recs)\ndef on='batch_id')\njoined['start_ts']=joined['day']*1440+joined['start_time'].map(tm)\nparts=[]\nfor m,g in joined.sort_values(['machine_id','start_ts']).groupby('machine_id', sort=False):\n    mg=maint[maint.machine_id==m][['event_ts','work_order_id','technician_id','next_event_ts']].sort_values('event_ts')\n    merged=pd.merge_asof(g.sort_values('start_ts'), mg, left_on='start_ts', right_on='event_ts', direction='backward')\n    parts.append(merged)\nlinked=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\nlinked=linked[linked['event_ts'].notna() & (linked['next_event_ts'].isna() | (linked['start_ts']<linked['next_event_ts']))].copy()\nlinked['rej']=linked['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED').astype(int)\nlinked['thr']=linked['product_id'].map(products)\nlinked['excess']=linked['rejected_pct']-linked['thr']\nprod_rate=linked.groupby('product_id')['rej'].mean().to_dict()\ntech_prod=linked.groupby(['technician_id','product_id']).agg(n=('batch_id','size'), r=('rej','sum'), wos=('work_order_id','nunique'), avg_excess=('excess', lambda s:s[linked.loc[s.index,'rej']==1].mean() if (linked.loc[s.index,'rej']==1).any() else 0), max_excess=('excess', lambda s:s[linked.loc[s.index,'rej']==1].max() if (linked.loc[s.index,'rej']==1).any() else 0)).reset_index()\n# compute binomial tail vs product baseline\nrows=[]\nfor _,row in tech_prod.iterrows():\n    if row['r']==0: continue\n    n=int(row['n']); r=int(row['r']); p=prod_rate[row['product_id']]\n    tail=0.0\n    for k in range(r,n+1):\n        tail += comb(n,k)*(p**k)*((1-p)**(n-k))\n    rows.append({**row.to_dict(), 'base':p, 'pval':tail})\nres=pd.DataFrame(rows)\n# display candidate rows with decent evidence\ncand=res[(res['pval']<0.02) | (res['max_excess']>0.04) | ((res['avg_excess']>0.03)&(res['r']>=2))].sort_values(['technician_id','pval','r'])\nprint(cand.to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

mp_stats.itertuples(index=False)}\n\ndef binom_tail(n,r,p):\n    s=0.0\n    for k in range(r,n+1):\n        s += comb(n,k)*(p**k)*((1-p)**(n-k))\n    return s\nrows=[]\nfor (woid, tech, mach, pid), g in linked.groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','product_id']):\n    n=len(g); r=int(g['rej'].sum())\n    if r==0: continue\n    mp_n, mp_r, mp_rate = mp_index[(mach,pid)]\n    rest_n = mp_n - n\n    rest_r = mp_r - r\n    rest_rate = rest_r/rest_n if rest_n>0 else 0.0\n    p0 = max(prod_rate[pid], rest_rate)\n    pval=binom_tail(n,r,p0)\n    rows.append({\n        'work_order_id':woid,'technician_id':tech,'machine_id':mach,'product_id':pid,\n        'n':n,'r':r,'p0':p0,'pval':pval,\n        'avg_excess': g.loc[g.rej==1,'excess'].mean(),\n        'max_excess': comb\nwo=pd.read_csv('/app/maintenance_work_orders.csv')\npat=re.compile(r'\"'^(.*?):'\"\\\\s*(.*)\"'$'\"')\nrecs=[]\nfor _,row in wo.iterrows():\n    data={}\n    with open('/app/'+row['report_path']) as f:\n        for line in f:\n            m=pat.match(line.strip())\n            if m:\n                data[m.group(1)] = m.group(2)\n    recs.append({'day':int(row['day']),'work_order_id':row['work_order_id'],'machine_id':data['MACHINE'],'technician_id':data['TECHNICIAN'],'completed':data['COMPLETED']})\nmaint=pd.DataFrame(recs)\ndef tm(s):\n    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))\n    return h*60+m\nmaint['event_ts']=maint['day']*1440+maint['completed'].map(tm)\nmaint=maint.sort_values(['machine_id','event_ts']).reset_index(drop=True)\nmaint['next_event_ts']=maint.groupby('machine_id')['event_ts'].shift(-1)\nassign=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')\nbatches=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')\nins=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')\nproducts=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv').set_index('product_id')['quality_rejection_threshold_pct']\njoined=assign.merge(batches[['batch_id','job_id','product_id','machine_id','production_day']], on=['job_id','machine_id'])\njoined=joined.merge(ins[['batch_id','inspection_result','rejected_pct']], on='batch_id')\njoined['start_ts']=joined['day']*1440+joined['start_time'].map(tm)\nparts=[]\nfor m,g in joined.sort_values(['machine_id','start_ts']).groupby('machine_id', sort=False):\n    mg=maint[maint.machine_id==m][['event_ts','work_order_id','technician_id','next_event_ts']].sort_values('event_ts')\n    merged=pd.merge_asof(g.sort_values('start_ts'), mg, left_on='start_ts', right_on='event_ts', direction='backward')\n    parts.append(merged)\nlinked=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\nlinked=linked[linked['event_ts'].notna() & (linked['next_event_ts'].isna() | (linked['start_ts']<linked['next_event_ts']))].copy()\nlinked['rej']=linked['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED').astype(int)\nlinked['thr']=linked['product_id'].map(products)\nlinked['excess']=linked['rejected_pct']-linked['thr']\nprod_rate=linked.groupby('product_id')['rej'].mean().to_dict()\nmp_stats=linked.groupby(['machine_id','product_id']).agg(n=('batch_id','size'), r=('rej','sum')).reset_index()\nmp_index={(row.machine_id,row.product_id):(int(row.n), int(row.r)) for row in mp_stats.itertuples(index=False)}\n\ndef binom_tail(n,r,p):\n    s=0.0\n    for k in range(r,n+1):\n        s += comb(n,k)*(p**k)*((1-p)**(n-k))\n    return s\nrows=[]\nfor (woid, tech, mach, pid), g in linked.groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','product_id']):\n    n=len(g); r=int(g['rej'].sum())\n    if r==0: continue\n    mp_n, mp_r = mp_index[(mach,pid)]\n    rest_n = mp_n - n\n    rest_r = mp_r - r\n    rest_rate = rest_r/rest_n if rest_n>0 else 0.0\n    p0=max(prod_rate[pid], rest_rate)\n    pval=binom_tail(n,r,p0)\n    rows.append({\n        'work_order_id':woid,'technician_id':tech,'machine_id':mach,'product_id':pid,'n':n,'r':r,'pval':pval,\n        'avg_excess': g.loc[g.rej==1,'excess'].mean(),'max_excess': g.loc[g.rej==1,'excess'].max(),\n    })\nres=pd.DataFrame(rows)\nfor crit_name, crit in [\n    ('p<1e-2', res.pval<1e-2),\n    ('p<5e-3', res.pval<5e-3),\n    ('p<1e-3', res.pval<1e-3),\n    ('p<1e-2 & max_excess>0.01', (res.pval<1e-2)&(res.max_excess>0.01)),\n    ('p<5e-3 & max_excess>0.01', (res.pval<5e-3)&(res.max_excess>0.01)),\n    ('p<1e-2 & avg_excess>0.02', (res.pval<1e-2)&(res.avg_excess>0.02)),\n]:\n    sub=res[crit]\n    tech=sub.groupby('technician_id').agg(b=('r','sum'), w=('work_order_id','nunique')).query('b>=3 and w>=2')\n    print('\\\\nCRIT', crit_name)\n    print('techs', sorted(tech.index.tolist()))\n    mapping={}\n    sub2=sub[sub.technician_id.isin(tech.index)]\n    for pid,g in sub2.groupby('product_id'):\n        mapping[pid]=sorted(g.technician_id.unique())\n    print(mapping)\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

r=('rej','sum')).reset_index()\nmp_index={(row.machine_id,row.product_id):(int(row.n), int(row.r)) for row in mp_stats.itertuples(index=False)}\n\ndef binom_tail(n,r,p):\n    s=0.0\n    for k in range(r,n+1):\n        s += comb(n,k)*(p**k)*((1-p)**(n-k))\n    return s\nrows=[]\nfor (woid, tech, mach, pid), g in linked.groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','product_id']):\n    n=len(g); r=int(g['rej'].sum())\n    if r==0: continue\n    mp_n, mp_r = mp_index[(mach,pid)]\n    rest_n = mp_n - n\n    rest_r = mp_r - r\n    rest_rate = rest_r/rest_n if rest_n>0 else 0.0\n    p0=max(prod_rate[pid], rest_rate)\n    pval=binom_tail(n,r,p0)\n    rows.append({\n        'work_order_id':woid,'technician_id':tech,'machine_id':mach,'product_id':pid,'n':n,'r':r,'pval':pval,\n ('p<1e-2 & avg_excess>0.02', (res.pval<1e-2)&(res.avg_excess>0.02)),\n]:\n    sub=res[crit]\n    tech=sub.groupby('technician_id').agg(b=('r','sum'), w=('work_order_id','nunique')).query('b>=3 and {"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_45","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\n# inspect TECH_032 suspicious groups and all rejects\nimport pandas as pd, re\nproducts=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv').set_index('product_id')['quality_rejection_threshold_pct']\nwo=pd.read_csv('/app/maintenance_work_orders.csv')\npat=re.compile(r'\"'^(.*?):'\"\\\\s*(.*)\"'$'\"')\nrecs=[]\nfor _,row in wo.iterrows():\n    data={}\n    with open('/app/'+row['report_path']) as f:\n        for line in f:\n            m=pat.match(line.strip())\n            if m:\n                data[m.group(1)] = m.group(2)\n    recs.append({'day':int(row['day']),'work_order_id':row['work_order_id'],'machine_id':data['MACHINE'],'technician_id':data['TECHNICIAN'],'completed':data['COMPLETED']})\nmaint=pd.DataFrame(recs)\ndef tm(s):\n    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))\n    return h*60+m\nmaint['event_ts']=maint['day']*1440+maint['completed'].map(tm)\nmaint=maint.sort_values(['machine_id','event_ts']).reset_index(drop=True)\nmaint['next_event_ts']=maint.groupby('machine_id')['event_ts'].shift(-1)\nassign=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')\nbatches=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')\nins=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')\njoined=assign.merge(batches[['batch_id','job_id','product_id','machine_id','production_day']], on=['job_id','machine_id'])\njoined=joined.merge(ins[['batch_id','inspection_result','rejected_pct']], on='batch_id')\njoined['start_ts']=joined['day']*1440+joined['start_time'].map(tm)\nparts=[]\nfor m,g in joined.sort_values(['machine_id','start_ts']).groupby('machine_id', sort=False):\n    mg=maint[maint.machine_id==m][['event_ts','work_order_id','technician_id','next_event_ts']].sort_values('event_ts')\n    merged=pd.merge_asof(g.sort_values('start_ts'), mg, left_on='start_ts', right_on='event_ts', direction='backward')\n    parts.append(merged)\nlinked=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\nlinked=linked[linked['event_ts'].notna() & (linked['next_event_ts'].isna() | (linked['start_ts']<linked['next_event_ts']))].copy()\nlinked['thr']=linked['product_id'].map(products)\nlinked['excess']=linked['rejected_pct']-linked['thr']\nrej=linked[(linked.technician_id=='TECH_032') & (linked.inspection_result=='REJECTED')]\nprint(rej[['batch_id','day','machine_id','product_id','work_order_id','rejected_pct','excess']].sort_values(['product_id','day']).to_string(index=False))\nprint('by work_order-product')\nprint(rej.groupby(['work_order_id','machine_id','product_id']).agg(r=('batch_id','size'), avg_excess=('excess','mean'), max_excess=('excess','max')).sort_values(['r','max_excess'], ascending=False).to_string())\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_48","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\n# inspect TECH_003 rejects\nimport pandas as pd, re\nproducts=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv').set_index('product_id')['quality_rejection_threshold_pct']\nwo=pd.read_csv('/app/maintenance_work_orders.csv')\npat=re.compile(r'\"'^(.*?):'\"\\\\s*(.*)\"'$'\"')\nrecs=[]\nfor _,row in wo.iterrows():\n    data={}\n    with open('/app/'+row['report_path']) as f:\n        for line in f:\n            m=pat.match(line.strip())\n            if m:\n                data[m.group(1)] = m.group(2)\n    recs.append({'day':int(row['day']),'work_order_id':row['work_order_id'],'machine_id':data['MACHINE'],'technician_id':data['TECHNICIAN'],'completed':data['COMPLETED']})\nmaint=pd.DataFrame(recs)\ndef tm(s):\n    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))\n    return h*60+m\nmaint['event_ts']=maint['day']*1440+maint['completed'].map(tm)\nmaint=maint.sort_values(['machine_id','event_ts']).reset_index(drop=True)\nmaint['next_event_ts']=maint.groupby('machine_id')['event_ts'].shift(-1)\nassign=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')\nbatches=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')\nins=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')\njoined=assign.merge(batches[['batch_id','job_id','product_id','machine_id','production_day']], on=['job_id','machine_id'])\njoined=joined.merge(ins[['batch_id','inspection_result','rejected_pct']], on='batch_id')\njoined['start_ts']=joined['day']*1440+joined['start_time'].map(tm)\nparts=[]\nfor m,g in joined.sort_values(['machine_id','start_ts']).groupby('machine_id', sort=False):\n    mg=maint[maint.machine_id==m][['event_ts','work_order_id','technician_id','next_event_ts']].sort_values('event_ts')\n    merged=pd.merge_asof(g.sort_values('start_ts'), mg, left_on='start_ts', right_on='event_ts', direction='backward')\n    parts.append(merged)\nlinked=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\nlinked=linked[linked['event_ts'].notna() & (linked['next_event_ts'].isna() | (linked['start_ts']<linked['next_event_ts']))].copy()\nlinked['thr']=linked['product_id'].map(products)\nlinked['excess']=linked['rejected_pct']-linked['thr']\nrej=linked[(linked.technician_id=='TECH_003') & (linked.inspection_result=='REJECTED')]\nprint(rej[['batch_id','day','machine_id','product_id','work_order_id','rejected_pct','excess']].sort_values(['product_id','day']).to_string(index=False))\nprint('by work_order-product')\nprint(rej.groupby(['work_order_id','machine_id','product_id']).agg(r=('batch_id','size'), avg_excess=('excess','mean'), max_excess=('excess','max')).sort_values(['r','max_excess'], ascending=False).to_string())\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_54","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport pandas as pd, re\nfrom math import comb\nwo=pd.read_csv('/app/maintenance_work_orders.csv')\npat=re.compile(r'\"'^(.*?):'\"\\\\s*(.*)\"'$'\"')\nrecs=[]\nfor _,row in wo.iterrows():\n    data={}\n    with open('/app/'+row['report_path']) as f:\n        for line in f:\n            m=pat.match(line.strip())\n            if m:\n                data[m.group(1)] = m.group(2)\n    recs.append({'day':int(row['day']),'work_order_id':row['work_order_id'],'machine_id':data['MACHINE'],'technician_id':data['TECHNICIAN'],'completed':data['COMPLETED']})\nmaint=pd.DataFrame(recs)\ndef on=['job_id','machine_id'])\njoined=joined.merge(ins[['batch_id','inspection_result','rejected_pct']], on='batch_id')\njoined['start_ts']=joined['day']*1440+joined['start_time'].map(tm)\nparts=[]\nfor m,g in joined.sort_values(['machine_id','start_ts']).groupby('machine_id', sort=False):\n    mg=maint[maint.machine_id==m][['event_ts','work_order_id','technician_id','next_event_ts']].sort_values('event_ts')\n    merged=pd.merge_asof(g.sort_values('start_ts'), mg, left_on='start_ts', right_on='event_ts', direction='backward')\n    parts.append(merged)\nlinked=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\nlinked=linked[linked['event_ts'].notna() & (linked['next_event_ts'].isna() | (linked['start_ts']<linked['next_event_ts']))].copy()\nlinked['rej']=linked['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED').astype(int)\nlinked['thr']=linked['product_id'].map(products)\nlinked['excess']=linked['rejected_pct']-linked['thr']\nprod_rate=linked.groupby('product_id')['rej'].mean().to_dict()\nmp_stats=linked.groupby(['machine_id','product_id']).agg(n=('batch_id','size'), r=('rej','sum')).reset_index()\nmp_index={(row.machine_id,row.product_id):(int(row.n), int(row.r)) for row in mp_stats.itertuples(index=False)}\n\ndef binom_tail(n,r,p):\n    s=0.0\n    for k in range(r,n+1):\n        s += comb(n,k)*(p**k)*((1-p)**(n-k))\n    return s\nrows=[]\nfor (woid, tech, mach, pid), g in linked.groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','product_id']):\n    n=len(g); r=int(g['rej'].sum())\n    if r==0: continue\n    mp_n, mp_r = mp_index[(mach,pid)]\n    rest_n = mp_n - n\n    rest_r = mp_r - r\n    rest_rate = rest_r/rest_n if rest_n>0 else 0.0\n    p0=max(prod_rate[pid], rest_rate)\n    pval=binom_tail(n,r,p0)\n    rows.append({\n        'work_order_id':woid,'technician_id':tech,'machine_id':mach,'product_id':pid,'n':n,'r':r,'pval':pval,\n        'avg_excess': g.loc[g.rej==1,'excess'].mean(),'max_excess': g.loc[g.rej==1,'excess'].max(),\n    })\nres=pd.DataFrame(rows)\nres=res.sort_values('pval').reset_index(drop=True)\n# BH q-values (simple procedure)\nm=len(res)\nres['rank']=range(1,m+1)\nres['bh_thresh']=res['rank']*0.05/m\nres['is_bh']=res['pval']<=res['bh_thresh']\n# compute monotone qvals\nq=[0]*m\nminq=1\nfor i in range(m-1,-1,-1):\n    val=res.loc[i,'pval']*m/(i+1)\n    minq=min(minq,val)\n    q[i]=minq\nres['qval']=q\nfor label, crit in [\n    ('BH q<=0.05', res.qval<=0.05),\n    ('BH q<=0.05 & max_excess>0.01', (res.qval<=0.05)&(res.max_excess>0.01)),\n    ('BH q<=0.1 & max_excess>0.01', (res.qval<=0.1)&(res.max_excess>0.01)),\n]:\n    sub=res[crit]\n    tech=sub.groupby('technician_id').agg(b=('r','sum'), w=('work_order_id','nunique')).query('b>=3 and w>=2')\n    mapping={}\n    sub2=sub[sub.technician_id.isin(tech.index)]\n    for pid,g in
